content: Qdrant pitfalls: Vector size and distance metric are immutable after collection creation requiring recreation on mismatch; wrong distance metric produces poor results silently; indexing only activates after threshold so small collections use brute-force; unoptimized segments from frequent inserts degrade search; payload index absence forces full scans on filtered queries; ef search parameter must be tuned separately from ef_construct; use collection aliasing for atomic reindex swaps; deterministic point IDs enable natural dedup via upsert.
